values: 用途：汇总现有 staged/reference_compare/reference_style 证据。注意：这不是 fresh CAD 通过证明；SolidWorks 未响应时只能作为历史/现有证据索引。

formula: =COUNTIF('参考对比明细'!E2:E51,"pass")+COUNTIF('参考对比明细'!E2:E51,"pass_with_warning")+COUNTIF('参考对比明细'!E2:E51,"no_reference")
=COUNTIF('样式门明细'!B2:B19,"pass")+COUNTIF('样式门明细'!B2:B19,"pass_with_warning")+COUNTIF('样式门明细'!B2:B19,"no_reference")
